mapper.insert: INSERT INTO loan_product (name, type, annual_rate, min_amount, max_amount, min_term, max_term, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{type}, #{annualRate}, #{minAmount}, #{maxAmount}, #{minTerm}, #{maxTerm}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE loan_product SET name = #{name}, type = #{type}, annual_rate = #{annualRate}, min_amount = #{minAmount}, max_amount = #{maxAmount}, min_term = #{minTerm}, max_term = #{maxTerm}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM loan_product ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM loan_product WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
